## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on GrowthX's delivery experience, team challenges, and new org structure.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Inconsistent Delivery:** Delivery is inconsistent, focusing on "business-as-usual" updates instead of strategic outcomes. This stems from a lack of a standardized customer journey and unclear success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**Capacity Risk:** The new Engagement Manager (EM) model (7–9 accounts) is untested. The planned shift to biweekly meetings is intended to create capacity, but this must be balanced against the risk of losing customer momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Unscalable Accounts:** High-touch, custom accounts (e.g., Okta at $12k/mo, Surge) are a major drain on senior resources, especially Jason, and prevent the development of repeatable processes.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**New Strategy Team:** Kyle will lead a new "shared strategy" team to standardize delivery, build playbooks, and capture/share insights across accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inconsistent Delivery & Unclear Success

  - [Delivery is inconsistent, focusing on "business-as-usual" updates (e.g., content output) instead of strategic outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [The root cause is a lack of a standardized customer journey and unclear success metrics, which leads to:](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Vague Strategy Sprint Exit Criteria:** No clear definition of what makes an account "ready" for ongoing delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Fragmented Onboarding:** No consistent, published engagement roadmap for new employees.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Unclear Escalation Paths:** Team members are unsure when to escalate or to whom.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [The current weekly meeting cadence often feels like "motion" without "momentum," as teams can struggle to find meaningful discussion points.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### The Solution: New Org Structure & Strategy Team

  - [The new EM model (7–9 accounts) aims to create capacity by separating client-facing roles from editing duties.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [The planned shift to biweekly meetings is intended to give EMs more time for strategic work, but this must be balanced against the risk of losing customer momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Kyle's new "shared strategy" team will standardize delivery by:](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
      - [**Building Playbooks:** Creating repeatable processes for common challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)
      - [**Capturing Insights:** Systematizing the sharing of learnings across accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2497.0)
      - [**Measuring Success:** Tracking metrics like ticket completion, client performance, and playbook creation.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)

### The Challenge: Unscalable Accounts

  - [High-touch, custom accounts are a major drain on senior resources, especially Jason, and prevent the development of repeatable processes.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**Okta ($12k/mo):** A custom project building SDR playbooks. The work is not transferable, and the scope is creeping. Kyle is scheduling a level-setting conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**Surge & AugmentCode:** High-paying but highly custom accounts that rely heavily on Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [**Strategic Decision:** GrowthX must decide if the brand value of these logos outweighs the operational cost and drag on scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
      - [Define a standardized customer journey roadmap with clear handoffs and success criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2583.0)
      - [Formalize escalation paths and define when to flag an account as "red."](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)
      - [Develop a "re-boarding" plan to upskill existing employees on the new delivery standards.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
      - [Investigate programmatic signals to proactively flag account health issues.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2651.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
      - [Refine success metrics for the new shared strategy team.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
      - [Establish a process for capturing and sharing insights across accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2497.0)
      - [Lead the level-setting conversation with Okta to clarify scope.](https://fathom.video/share/xvxxiygRwQczLSycaffG5Qz9KFWPj3zA?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
